Stale persisted active profile degrades safely

steps.expected: Stale active marker cleared without crash

assertions.title: Popover switch meets fast interaction budget

frictions.description: xcresulttool required the modern invocation `get object --legacy`; deprecated `get` form failed initially.

summary: Tested 10 assertions (VAL-POPOVER-001..010) via scoped xcodebuild SwitcherPopoverUITests run: 10 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Suite executed 44 tests with 0 failures.
